author: matthewkeil
content:
Had an amazing AI related meeting last week and would love to share it with the group.  We will be doing these on a regular cadence and will start to cross post meeting invites here if in case anyone else is interested in joining.  Had a good cross-team representation on the last call and it was an honor to host everyone.  Anyone in the community is welcome to join future sessions.  Please stay tuned.

In the mean time you can find info from the last one below.

Meeting Agenda:
https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/discussions/9062

Meeting Minutes:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yPfRqMOHXPvCywkgE9MVCXxGyITgR43GffdK2iAH5QE/edit?usp=sharing

Recording:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cvQFbSttWVgMo9YhibRXiYZKYeH5GwR7/view?usp=sharing

Full Transcript:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yPfRqMOHXPvCywkgE9MVCXxGyITgR43GffdK2iAH5QE/edit?usp=sharing
